items.title: Michael Jackson biopic smashes box office record
items.dek: The film received poor reviews but has stormed the box office, taking $217m (£160m) globally.
items.body: The film received poor reviews but has stormed the box office, taking $217m (£160m) globally.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: At least 42 killed in Chad after water well dispute escalates
items.dek: The dispute was initially between two families before escalating into a cycle of reprisal attacks.
items.body: The dispute was initially between two families before escalating into a cycle of reprisal attacks.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump says King will be 'very safe' during US visit after security talks
items.dek: The state visit will go ahead despite concerns raised after a gunman targeted an event attended by the president.
items.body: The state visit will go ahead despite concerns raised after a gunman targeted an event attended by the president.
